message:
test(atc): close learning loop E2E (br-bn0vb.14)

Normalize ATC project hints so fetch_inbox observations dedupe across wrapped-tool and HTTP dispatch paths, reuse compatible in-memory pools for live ATC writes, and add the end-to-end learning loop coverage for send/fetch/ack/overdue/rollup/replay retention.

Verification:
- cargo test -p mcp-agent-mail-server fetch_inbox_atc_observation_dedupes_raw_and_normalized_project_hints -- --nocapture
- cargo test -p mcp-agent-mail-server --test e2e_atc_learning_loop e2e_message_learning_loop_covers_ack_and_ack_overdue_branches -- --nocapture
- rch exec -- cargo check -p mcp-agent-mail-server --tests
